Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification
Title: B7. Sarcasm Classification

Problem:
Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1).
Determine the 3-bit pattern.

Grading target:
Exact match on the 3-bit string.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

authored_response.decision_notes: The task requires classifying three distinct Reddit replies. I will split the classification task into two helpers to ensure high accuracy and focus.

helpers.label: classifier_part_1
helpers.instructions:
Analyze the following two Reddit replies and classify each as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1). Provide the classification for each and a brief reason why.

Reply 1: [Insert text of Reddit reply 1 here]
Reply 2: [Insert text of Reddit reply 2 here]

helpers.label: classifier_part_2
helpers.instructions:
Analyze the following Reddit reply and classify it as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1). Provide the classification and a brief reason why.

Reply 3: [Insert text of Reddit reply 3 here]

authored_response.synthesis_brief: Combine the classifications from both helpers into a single 3-bit string (e.g., '010'). Format the final response as: FINAL_ANSWER: <3-bit string> followed by a JUSTIFICATION that summarizes the reasoning for each bit based on the helpers' evaluations.
